compiled_state.author: Iso Tester
compiled_state.description:
Document the remediation re-review and prove it offline. Add a `docs/plan-review-gate.md`
section AND an ADR under `docs/adr/` (recording the chosen design, the three rejected
alternatives, and the invariants: Pass-1 unanchored; novelty in a SEPARATE Pass-2 sub-call;
drop decision deterministic in Pass-3). Add FakeRunner tests covering convergence on a
remediation edit (novel low-priority dropped, carryover enforced, novel high-priority
preserved) plus every precondition fallback to a byte-identical full review (code drift,
window expiry, registry skew, no/old sidecar, config off).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `docs/plan-review-gate.md` section on the rising-floor remediation re-review
- [ ] An ADR under `docs/adr/` records the design, 3 rejected alternatives, and the invariants
- [ ] FakeRunner test: convergence on a remediation edit in `tests/unit/`
- [ ] FakeRunner tests: each precondition fallback -> byte-identical full review
- [ ] Test: novel high-priority preserved; carryover still enforced at the normal bar

## Prerequisites (already delivered on this work branch — this task only CONSUMES them)

This task is the documentation + offline proof for machinery delivered by its sibling children,
all already implemented and closed on the epic's work branch (a plan review grounding against
`origin/main` will not see them yet — review this ticket with `--source local`):

- **e344** — `sidecar.latest_review_result` / finding-prose persistence (the prior findings the
  novelty sub-call re-grounds on).
- **150b** — `decide.NOVELTY_SUBANSWERS` + `decide.novelty` (the deterministic novelty score),
  `verify.score_novelty` + the registered `novelty` contract (the SEPARATE Pass-2 sub-call), and
  the `discriminates_novelty` eval gate.
- **ec89** — `attest.remediation_mode_candidate` (the freshness-window + precondition eligibility
  decision) + the `verify.remediation_mode` / `remediation_window_minutes` config keys.
- **cc5b** — `decide.rising_floor_drop` (the deterministic drop predicate) + the
  `_apply_floor_to_verdict` / `_maybe_apply_rising_floor` seam in `_run_plan_review` + the
  `verify.novelty_drop_threshold` / `novelty_priority_floor` / `novelty_drop_active` keys.

This task introduces NO new production mechanism — it adds the docs/ADR and FakeRunner tests that
hook into these existing seams (the convergence test drives `score_novelty` via a
`FakeRunner(structured={"novelties": ...})`; the precondition-fallback tests drive
`remediation_mode_candidate` / `_maybe_apply_rising_floor` directly).

file_impact.reason: section on the rising-floor remediation re-review

compiled_state.title: Docs + offline convergence tests for remediation re-review
